pkgmetadata.longdescription: Cursor is an AI-first code editor built as a fork of Visual Studio Code. This package installs the prebuilt Cursor desktop application from the upstream .deb release. Mirrored from Gentoo's app-editors/cursor and kept current by the overlay's auto-update CI.

use.flag: Use EGL for smooth rendering on high refresh rate monitors
Run in wayland mode under wayland sessions, xwayland otherwise. This flag doesn't affect x11 sessions.
